summary: Frontend-only testing of static personal website SPA. All 20+ requested functionalities verified successfully on https://impact-canvas-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Hero, Vision (4 pillars), Journey (7 items), Skills (4 categories), Projects (3 cards), Achievements (6 stats), Certificates (filters + modal), Connect, footer quote, mobile menu, scroll anchors, and resume PDF links all functional. No console/page errors detected.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero.jsx carousel: 'Exploring' label is a separate span; visually spaced via flex gap-3 (correct), but text_content() returns 'ExploringTechnology...' concatenated. Not a visible bug but consider adding aria-label or sr-only space for screen readers.

Connect section uses placeholder URLs (mailto:[your.email@example.com], linkedin.com/in/your-handle, github.com/your-handle) — by design per problem statement (placeholder content), no action needed unless personalization is later required.
Resume PDF at /resume-placeholder.pdf — placeholder by design.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure static SPA, dark mode default. All sections and data-testids verified working. Carousel rotates through 6 phrases (4 unique observed in 8s sampling — cycles correctly). Certificate filters: ALL=9 cards, Programming=2 cards. Modal opens with title/org/date/verify-link and closes via close button. Mobile menu toggle works at 375px viewport. No backend exists — do not test API endpoints.
